title: Cost Plan
description: An elemental cost plan: the project's spend grouped by building and bill.

steps.title: Elemental cost plan
steps.description: Spend grouped by building, floor and bill.
steps.voiceScript: The cost plan groups the project's spend by building, floor and bill.
steps.captionText: The cost plan groups the project's spend by building, floor and bill.
steps.fallbackMessage: Elemental cost plan: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Building contributions
steps.description: See which building drives the cost.
steps.voiceScript: Each building's share of the cost is shown so you can see the cost drivers.
steps.captionText: Each building's share of the cost is shown so you can see the cost drivers.
steps.fallbackMessage: Building contributions: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Export the deck
steps.description: The cost plan prints as a decision deck.
steps.voiceScript: Export the cost plan as a decision-ready deck.
steps.captionText: Export the cost plan as a decision-ready deck.
